title: Horner's rule evaluates the polynomial correctly
statement_informal: Horner's rule horner [a0;...;ak] x = a0 + x*(a1 + x*(...)) computes the polynomial sum Σ a_i x^i with n multiplications. Correctness twin of horner-multiplications (which counts the n multiplications): horner cs x = poly cs x.

cost_model.notes: Nested form: n mults, n adds. Correctness via powsum cs x i = x^i * horner cs x (induction on cs, Nat.pow_succ_r' + ring).

references: Horner's rule (TAOCP Vol. 2 §4.6.4). Correctness twin of work-units/horner-multiplications.
